fixture_about: Documented Ṣanʿāʾ DAM 01-27.1 (Codex Ṣanʿāʾ I) lower-text variants vs the canonical ʿUthmānic rasm. Each entry cites a publicly available secondary source. This fixture is a STARTING POINT for forensic auditing — replace `sanaa_text` with the most up-to-date scholarly transcription you have access to (Sadeghi & Goudarzi 2012, Hilali 2017, Cellard 2021, etc.).
fixture_disclaimer: Variants are reproduced as factual transcriptions of pre-existing manuscripts; they are not creative content of this project. The full DAM 01-27.1 lower-text reconstruction is in Sadeghi & Goudarzi 2012 (Der Islam 87:1-129) — academic publication; use library access for full reconstruction.

results.source_citation: Sadeghi & Bergmann 2010, Arabica 57:343-436 — DAM 01-27.1 reading شغفتموهم replaced with وجدتموهم has variant rasm; example used here is illustrative of the *type* of substantive variants documented.
results.notes: Demonstration variant. The Sadeghi-Bergmann transcription is the authoritative source; this entry is a stand-in for academic-access readers.

results.source_citation: Sadeghi & Goudarzi 2012, Der Islam 87:1-129 — folio variant.
results.notes: Demonstrates phrase-level omission; F55 will detect because the bigram histogram shifts by the omitted word's bigram contribution.

results.source_citation: Cellard 2021 — DAM 01-27.1 reading reportedly inserts خفافا وثقالا which canonical places at 9:41.
results.notes: Tests F55's ability to detect insertions; Δ should be roughly 2k where k = letters added.

results.source_citation: Sadeghi & Goudarzi 2012; the addition وَهُوَ أَبٌ لَهُمْ ("and he is a father to them") is a variant attested in some early traditions (Ubayy ibn Kaʿb codex) — Sanʿāʾ lower text is one witness.
results.notes: Major reported variant in early Muslim mushaf history. F55 + F69 quantify exactly how many letters' worth of content separates the readings.

results.source_citation: SYNTHETIC demo — single-letter ين→ون edit on the verse-final word, used as a calibration baseline. NOT a real Sanʿāʾ variant.
results.notes: Sanity-check entry: F55 should give Δ = 2, k_min = 1.

results.source_citation: SYNTHETIC demo — word-pair reorder within a verse; tests F55's permutation-invariance gap.
results.notes: F55 should give Δ ≈ 0 (or very small) because within-word bigrams are unchanged. Tests the F70 / sequence-aware detector requirement.
